leadText: Inner Focus (Japanese: せいしんりょく Force of Will) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations III to VII 1.1.2 Generation VIII onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III to VII [ edit | edit source ] Inner Focus prevents the Pokémon from flinching . However, Pokémon with this Ability can still flinch to a Pokémon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze . While some descriptions state that the user flinches, Focus Punch failing due to taking damage is not flinching, so the move is unaffected by Inner Focus. If the Pokémon is hit by a move that always causes flinching, the message " 's Inner Focus prevents flinching! " ( Generation III ) or " won't flinch because of its Inner Focus! " ( Generation IV ) will appear. No message is displayed in later generations. Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Inner Focus now also blocks Intimidate . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Inner Focus has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations III to VII [ edit | edit source ] Inner Focus prevents the Pokémon from flinching . However, Pokémon with this Ability can still flinch to a Pokémon with Mold Breaker , Teravolt , or Turboblaze . While some descriptions state that the user flinches, Focus Punch failing due to taking damage is not flinching, so the move is unaffected by Inner Focus. If the Pokémon is hit by a move that always causes flinching, the message " 's Inner Focus prevents flinching! " ( Generation III ) or " won't flinch because of its Inner Focus! " ( Generation IV ) will appear. No message is displayed in later generations. Generation VIII onward [ edit | edit source ] Inner Focus now also blocks Intimidate .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Prevents cringing. MD T D S Protects the Pokémon from cringing. B S L ひるみじょうたいに ならない Conq. The Pokémon is protected from flinching. MD GtI Prevents the Cringe status condition. * It protects the Pokémon from the Cringe status condition! It won't ever Cringe! * S MD It protects the Pokémon from the flinch status condition! MD RT DX This Ability protects the Pokémon from the Flinch status condition.
